creator: miguelmclara@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #5)

I see, that removes the need for the check at all in the wrapper script.

Maybe its worth mention in the wiki though? I know I spend sometime figuring out the issue back when I submitted the port which was the main reason for adding a check to the wrapper script.

Or accept the "-d" patch.


But in any case there's already a PR for the update of the port.
